# Jakir Hussain — Complete Professional Profile
# https://iam-hussain.site
# This file provides comprehensive context for AI systems.

## Professional Summary
Senior Full-Stack & AI Platform Engineer with 8+ years of experience building cloud-native and AI-powered platforms using Node.js, TypeScript, React, and GraphQL across fintech and media environments. Specialized in production AI systems including multi-agent LLM architectures, LangChain/LangGraph orchestration, MCP-based tool integrations, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines deployed on scalable cloud infrastructure.

## Work Experience

### Lead — Technology | Synechron Technologies LLC (Client: Emirates NBD)
Period: December 2024 – Present
Location: Dubai, UAE

#### Enterprise AI Platform — Emirates NBD
Leading the architecture and rollout of Emirates NBD's enterprise AI platform to standardize development of secure, production-grade LLM applications and accelerate AI adoption across engineering teams.
- Architecting a centralized AI development platform enabling teams to build scalable AI applications with standardized tooling, governance controls, and reusable infrastructure
- Designing reusable multi-agent orchestration frameworks using Node.js, TypeScript, LangChain, and LangGraph
- Building shared AI SDKs and MCP-based tool infrastructure for secure enterprise system integration
- Establishing AI governance guardrails: prompt safety, authorization controls, data masking, compliance validation
- Accelerated internal AI development by enabling reusable agent frameworks adopted across multiple engineering teams
Technologies: Node.js, TypeScript, LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, Multi-Agent Systems, RAG, Vector Embeddings, OpenAI, Claude, LLaMA, Redis

#### Treasury AI Copilot (Calypso Integration) — Emirates NBD
Architected and delivered an AI assistant enabling real-time treasury insights and operational decision support within a regulated banking environment.
- Built a multi-agent LLM system with deterministic orchestration, tool execution, and auditable response validation
- Implemented LangGraph-based agent orchestration with workflow control, retries, and failure isolation
- Developed RAG pipelines using vector embeddings for context-aware responses while preventing sensitive data exposure
- Integrated MCP tools to securely invoke Calypso APIs for treasury data retrieval
- Implemented Redis session memory and caching for conversational context and low-latency AI responses
- Integrated multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Claude, LLaMA) with dynamic routing and fallback strategies
Technologies: Node.js, TypeScript, LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, RAG, Vector Embeddings, OpenAI, Claude, LLaMA, Redis, Calypso APIs

#### Open Finance Platform — Emirates NBD
Owned backend architecture and API development under UAE Central Bank "Compete & Comply" Open Banking framework.
- Designed Node.js/TypeScript microservices for secure consent-driven financial data exchange
- Built REST and GraphQL APIs with React dashboards for regulatory workflows
- Integrated 3Scale API Gateway and automated CI/CD (Jenkins, OpenShift), reducing release cycles by 40%
- Worked directly with UAE Central Bank stakeholders for compliance
Technologies: Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Apollo, React.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, 3Scale, Jenkins

### Software Engineer II | Condé Nast Technology Lab
Period: June 2021 – November 2024
Location: Bangalore, India

#### The New Yorker — Personalization & Content Platforms
- Built a full-stack AI-driven personalization platform integrating ML recommendations with React/Next.js, increasing engagement by 27%
- Developed scalable React/Next.js applications backed by GraphQL APIs for high-traffic editorial content
- Implemented Kubernetes CronJobs for automated Instagram caption ingestion and content synchronization
- Delivered server-driven UI architecture reducing duplicated frontend logic by 40%
- Built "Name Drop" quiz app with animation-based UX and performance profiling
- Improved newsletter subscription modules, increasing signups by 18%
Technologies: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Node.js, Prisma, MongoDB, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, GitHub Actions, Datadog

### Software Developer | HTC Global Services
Period: February 2020 – June 2021
Location: Chennai, India
- Built microservice Node.js REST APIs supporting 50K+ students on Manipal University platform
- Developed serverless data pipelines (AWS Lambda, SQS, DynamoDB) improving processing speed by 60%
- Integrated Elasticsearch for search and analytics
Technologies: Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch, AWS Lambda, SQS, Docker

### Node JS Developer | Develop Script LLC
Period: December 2018 – January 2020
Location: Chennai, India
- Built real-time auction platforms with Node.js, Express, and Socket.IO
- Implemented Redis Pub/Sub for low-latency bid synchronization
Technologies: Node.js, Express.js, React.js, Socket.IO, Redis, MySQL

## Complete Technical Skills

### AI / LLM Engineering
LangChain, LangGraph, Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agentic AI Systems, RAG, Vector Embeddings, Vector Databases, LLM Function Calling, LLM Evaluation, AI Observability, Prompt Engineering, OpenAI API, Claude, LLaMA, LLM Streaming (SSE), AI Guardrails

### Backend & APIs
Node.js, Bun, TypeScript, Express.js, Hapi, REST APIs, GraphQL, Apollo GraphQL, GraphQL Modules, Prisma ORM, Sequelize ORM

### Frontend
React.js, Next.js, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, Styled Components, Framer Motion, Storybook

### Data & Search
MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, DynamoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch

### Cloud & DevOps
AWS, Lambda, S3, Docker, Podman, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Serverless Architectures

### Testing
Playwright, Cypress, Jest, Mocha, Chai, Cucumber.js, Vitest

### Engineering Practices
System Design, Software Architecture, Microservices, Distributed Systems, Performance Engineering, Secure Development, CI/CD Automation, Accessibility (WCAG)

## Quantified Impact
